ddls:
CREATE TABLE "taxonomy" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomy entry */,
  "superkingdom" TEXT /* Superkingdom of the organism */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the organism */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the organism */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the organism */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family of the organism */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assembly_levels" (
  "assembly_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assembly level */,
  "assembly_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the assembly level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assembly_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_types" (
  "release_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release type */,
  "release_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the release type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "submitters" (
  "submitter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each submitter */,
  "submitter_name" TEXT /* Name of the submitter */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the submitter */,
  "submitter_institution" TEXT /* Institution of the submitter */,
  "submitter_department" TEXT /* Department of the submitter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submitter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Is the user active? */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the genome assembly */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the genome assembly was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user when accessing the genome assembly */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_assembly_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly */,
  "stat_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic */,
  "stat_value" TEXT /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genome_assembly_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata */,
  "assembly_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genome assembly */,
  "metadata_name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "metadata_value" TEXT /* Value of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each taxonomy entry
Unique identifier for each assembly level
Unique identifier for each release type
Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin)
Unique identifier for each access event
ID of the genome assembly being accessed
ID of the user accessing the genome assembly
Date when the genome assembly was accessed
IP address of the user when accessing the genome assembly
